_doc.vs_alpha: Anti-typicality boost exponent. Zhang 2025: 0.6-0.7 sweet spot.
_doc.vs_concept_count: Number of concepts VS generates. 5 balances diversity vs token cost.
_doc.vs_convergence_threshold: Pairwise jaccard/cosine above which we re-prompt for divergence.
_doc.originality_weight: Weight in arbitration. 0.8 = lower than craft/aesthetic (1.0) but higher than designer (0.25).
_doc.originality_history_window: Top-N most recent accepted entries from facts.jsonl.
_doc.boost_factor_cap: Anti-typicality boost capped at 1.6x to prevent runaway selection of low-prob outliers.
_doc.min_concept_quality_threshold: Concepts with rationale shorter than this fraction of max get filtered.
